assertions.reason: The STT models endpoint returns empty array because the symlink 'sherpa-onnx-whisper-tiny.en' is not detected as a directory by entry.isDirectory() on macOS. The readdirSync returns it as a symlink, not a directory.

Cannot test - profile creation via browser is blocked by auth middleware. The /api/profile endpoint requires authentication, and onboarding flow requires profile creation to access Settings.
Cannot test - profile creation via browser is blocked

blockers.description: Auth middleware does not include '/profile' as public path. POST /api/profile requires auth token. The fix from commit 59adb57 (Fix auth middleware to allow public profile creation) was reverted in later commits.
blockers.evidence: curl -X POST http://localhost:3100/api/profile returns 401 Unauthorized without token

blockers.description: STT models endpoint returns empty array. The symlink 'sherpa-onnx-whisper-tiny.en' is not detected as a directory by entry.isDirectory() on macOS (readdirSync returns it as a symlink). The isSymlink() check is missing in the code.

frictions: Browser registration flow creates account but does not navigate to profile form - button click times out
Onboarding flow requires profile creation before accessing Settings page, but profile creation is blocked by auth
notes: Testing was performed against localhost:3101 (frontend) and localhost:3100 (backend). Profile creation via API works (with token), but browser flow is blocked. STT models endpoint has a symlink detection bug.
